{{CargoClone
|name=Amazon Queen
|rank=orange
|cabin=2
|id=140
|gene1={race} HP +500
|gene2={race} FAME +50
|gene3=Quantum Amp production +3%
|gene4=Per 60 Angel Minions in battle,
Troop Water DMG +6
|gene5=Gene Simulation Power Checks -0.9%
|gene6=Per 60 Angel Minions in battle,
Troop Water DMG +10
|gene7=Gene Simulation Power Checks -1.5%
|}}
